values.value: Jurisdictional Context and Air Quality Conformity Review - {ProjectName}

Jurisdictional boundary review triggered by EPA NEPAssist Boundaries layer detection ({LayerLabel}). If tribal land intersection detected: initiate government-to-government consultation and tribal notification per NHPA Section 106 and CEQ regulations; document all affected tribal nations and consult with BIA. If non-attainment area intersection detected: evaluate CAA General Conformity applicability (40 CFR Part 93 Subpart B) — determine whether project total direct and indirect emissions exceed de minimis thresholds for the applicable criteria pollutant; prepare conformity determination if required. Document federal land boundaries to confirm lead agency jurisdiction and applicable land use plan consistency requirements.
